name: ASUS ROG STRIX Z690-E GAMING WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Support DDR5-6400(OC) - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 3.0 x16 - 5x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen 2x2 Type-C - HDMI 2.1 - DP - Intel 2.5GbE LAN - Intel Wi-Fi 6E - BT 5.2
shortName: ASUS ROG STRIX Z690-E GAMING WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700
description: High-end ASUS ROG gaming ATX motherboard with DDR5 support, WiFi 6E, and five M.2 slots for enthusiasts.
